# haven — How to cite

If you found this project useful as a reference for your own self-hosted infrastructure, you are welcome to credit it.

## Plain text

> Huybrechts, V. *haven* — self-hosted home server on Hetzner Cloud. 2026. https://github.com/huybrechtsxyz/haven

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{huybrechts2026haven,
  author       = {Huybrechts, V.},
  title        = {{haven}},
  year         = {2026},
  howpublished = {\url{https://github.com/huybrechtsxyz/haven}}
}
```
